---
title: "Sketches of the Rites and Customs of the Greco-Russian Church By H. C. Romanoff.  With introduction by the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe”."
---

## Sketches of the Rites and Customs of the Greco-Russian Church By H. C. Romanoff.  With introduction by the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe”.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1868
**Genre:** Non-fiction: preface
**Format:** preface to book

**Publisher:** London: Rivingtons

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
